titleStmt.title: SII 30.233: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 233. (A.R. No. 584 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-on the west wall of the Mukha-maṇḍapa Jaṭ. Vīra-Pāṇḍya: Year 7, Monday, Hasta: 1260 A.D.

summary.p: Records that the temple officials of Piṇakkaṟukkum-nāyanār temple at Śri Parāntaka-Chaturvēḍimaṅgalam, a brahmadeya in Āri-nadu sold a plot of land as kārāṇmai (the right of cultivating the land) belonging to the temple to Chakrāyudan alias Vikrama pāndya pāṇmar, a native of Cheṇgoḍi in Malai-maṇḍalam for one achchu. He has to measure out certain amount of paddy and other items to the temple. The temple official Tillai Mūvāyira bhaṭṭan and others are figures as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ vaḷarmulai tirumārpu taḷaipaṭap porumakaḷ vaḷarmulai puyam
puṇarntu kaḷippa naṉmoḻi nāmicai colmakaḷiruppat ticaikaḷeṭṭu(m) micaimakaḷayara Irumu
ṉṟu camaiyamumoru muṉṟu tamiḻum vetanāṅku nitiyil viḷaṅka kaṅkaṅ kavuṭam kaṭāraṅ
kācipaṅ koṅkukiraṅ kocala māḷava Arumiṉañ coṉakañ cīṉamavanti karunaṭamīḻaṅ kaliṅkan te
liṅkam veppuḷan taṇṭaka paṇṭar mutaliya Eppuvi ventarumikal maṉṭalikarum mummuracu muḻaṅkac ce
mmaṇi māḷikai koyiṟ koṟṟavāyil pukuntu kālam pārttuk kaḻaliṇai paṇintu nalla veḻamuṅ neti
yamumkāṭṭip pūviri colaik kāvirik kaḷattuc coḻaṉ poruta veḻap poril matappiṟ ṟārā
katattaḷi yāṉait tuḷaikkaic cempoṟ tuṭikkaiyiṟ piṭittu vaḷaittu melkoṇṭu vākaicūṭit talai
p perāṇmait taṉittaṉiyeṭuttu talaikkavirācar kaviṉpeṟat tutippac ceṟṟa maṉṉar tikiri tiriyāma
l loṟṟai yāḻiyulaku valamā yeṉai maṉṉavarikaik koṭiyiṟaiñca miṉavarkoṭi meruvil Ōṅka va
ṭukaraik koṭuṅkol vaḻaṅkāvaṇṇa naṭuvunilaic ceṅkol nāṭoṟu naṭappa Etticai maruṅkumi
ruṅkali kaṭintu muttaveṇkuṭai muḻunilavu coriyap potumoḻi tira puvimuḻutāṇṭu matimārpu viḷa
ṅka maṇimuṭi cūṭi vāytta veṇkavariyum vāṭaiyum teṉṟalum ventar vica virasimhāsaṉa
ttu kaṟpakam taruviya kāmavalli porppuyam mulaive
ṉṉāṇai naṭāttuk kaṭavuḷ kaṟpiṟ kamalattiruveṉ koṟṟavar makaḷiṟ poṟṟiṭa nayantu palakamala
ṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvanac cakravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇḍyatevaṟku yāṇṭu Ēḻā
vatu tiṅkaṭk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ Ārināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīparāntakac caturvetimaṅkala
ttup piṇakkaṟukkum nāyaṉār koyiṟ śrīrudraśrīmāheśvararom malaimaṇṭalattu ceṅkoṭi kuṉṟa cakrāyutanāṉa vi[kramapāṇṭiya paṉmaṟkuvi
ṟṟu kārāṇmai vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivaṉ malaiyaṭikkuṟiccik kāraṇavar pakkal caṇṭeśvara
ppāṇḍyapererik kīḻ ceṉnāṟṟu maṭaip pokkilivaṉukkuk kārāṇmai vilaip piramāṇam paṇṇikku
laiyuṅ karuṅkuḷattu nāḷikkallukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Innāyanār tevatāṉamt tiruppa
rappakkal Ivvikkiramaciṅka tevar kāloṭu nattam paṟṟil paṟṟi koṇṭu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa
ku nīr pāykiṟa kālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ikkālukku teṟkum Āka Innāṉkellaikku
m pāḻum toṭṭamum kuṭiyiruppum meṉokkiṉa(kkiṉa) mara muṅ kīḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟu
ṉukku Ivan vaṟkattāṟkkum cantirātittaval celvatākavum Ivaraiyiṭṭu kuṭuppitta Accukkum
ṉavaṟkku Innilam caṇṭeśvaravilaiyāka koḷkaikku Ivaraiyiṭṭu kuṭuppitta Accukkum
l kaṇakka mutalikaḷukku Ivar kuṭutta Accukkum piḷḷai vāṇagovaraiyar Eḻāvatu Innāyaṉār
ceṉṟu makallāta Accukku Eṅkaḷ piḷḷaikātta perumāṉaṟku Eṭṭāvatu Ai(la)ppaci mātam Iv
la vanta Accukku Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam kārāṇmai vilaiyāka Aṉupavippārākavum Aṉupa
koṇṭa nilattukku pannīraṭik kolāl nilam Orumāvukku ceppunāḻikku Okkum pattañcāṅkālāl patuṉañcu
l viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟumukkālum tulāviṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu
taṟcenkai muḷaipaṭi Iravālavāci nīkki cīpaṇṭāra Aṟaivāy vācalile Iṭṭaḷantu taravu koḷvāṉākavum
lattukku māttāl patiṉāṟumeṉi Oru tiramamum puṉcey paṟṟil viḷainta nilattukku māttālaraittirama
taḷavuṉ payiṟceyyum Ivaiyiṟṟukku māttāl Oru māvaccu koṇṭu vara coṟum kaṟiyamutu
veḻutalaṅkāy Iṭuvārāka veṟṟilait toṭṭañ ceyyuṉ nilattukku Āṇṭoṉṟukku māttāl Araik kālāka vanta Accum Ilaiyi
meṟpaṭi Oṉṟuṅkoḷḷa kaṭavomākavum Ērvari pacuvari poṉvari cūṟaivari maṟṟum
koḷvomākavum Ippaṟṟil Ūr ceytu kuṭiyirukku maṉaikku kolāl mukko
lukku Aiṅkolāka maṉaiyoṉṟukku patiṉāṟu meni yaraittiramaṅ koḷvomākavum
nir pāykiṟa kāl puṅkaṅkuḷattukkuṅ kāṭeṟṟukkum Irukkoḻiyātuñcākkavar pāccikkuṭuppomānom
paṟṟi niṟkum vayirākiyoruttanukku Orumācceyyāka mu cūṭṭukkoṇṭu Ikkālum Aṇaiyum nokki nīr pā
ṭuppāṉākavum māttāl kuṟuṇi nellup pūvilai koḷvomākavum vayirākikku māttāl kuṟuṇi nellum �
yaṭuvārākavum yippaṟṟil mikutik kuṟaivuḷḷiṭṭa mākak kuṭuppomākavum Ippaṭi cantirātit
tavaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷvārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kārāṇmaip piṭipāṭu
paṇṇik kuṭuttom śrīrudramāheśvararom vikkiṟamaciṅka tevaṟkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattāṟkum Ivaite
vakaṉmi tillai mu(va)vāyira paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai tevakaṉmi Iṭai nikki paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai tevakaṉmi nā(l)ppatteṇṇā
yira paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tevakaṉmi vāṇagovaraiya brahmātarāyar Eḻuttu Ivai pūmi tevaṉeḻuttu Ivai māṭāpattiyaṉ
nantipaṉmaṉeḻuttu Ivai māṭāpattiyam tiruttoṇippiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai tirumāḷikai tevaṉeḻuttu
Ivai nityāṉantaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai virapattira vaiyirāki Eḻuttu Ivai paṉmāhe[ śvaraṉ] Eḻuttu Ivai kecava piḷḷai
Eḻuttu Ivai cikāriyam vittarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Akāṇam māṇikkavācaṉeḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
